args.Instruction: "Add topics and world-map route mappings, and remove old routes."
args.ReplacementContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {
  home: renderHome,
  dictionary: renderDictionary,
  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'topics': renderTopics,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection,
  'world-map': renderWorldMap
};"
args.TargetContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {

  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'vs-sim': renderVsSim,
  'news-feed': renderNews,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection
};"
